note: Morning ARRIVAL times (IST) at Tirupati, from the FlightAware VOTP board. Used two ways: (1) the dashboard draws them as landing markers on the depletion curve, and (2) the scraper starts polling (earliest arrival minus start_buffer_min) so it is already running before the first flight lands, then stops when available hits 0. These are scheduled times (with today's actuals noted); the real 'first flight landed' signal is the first drop in the token curve. Edit as the timetable changes.
sources: FlightAware VOTP airport board (arrivals + en route/scheduled), 2026-07-23

arrivals.note: FIRST morning arrival; route of your Sep 9 flight; actual today ~07:09
